cases.name: arithmetic_complex_test-1
cases.sql: SELECT ((a + b) * c) / d AS complex_result FROM calc_data WHERE id = 1

cases.name: arithmetic_complex_test-2
cases.sql: SELECT CAST((a + (b * c)) AS REAL) / CAST(d AS REAL) AS different_grouping FROM calc_data WHERE id = 1

cases.name: arithmetic_complex_test-3
cases.sql: SELECT a * (b + (c * d)) AS deeply_nested FROM calc_data WHERE id = 1

cases.name: arithmetic_complex_test-4
cases.sql: SELECT quantity * price * (1 - discount) * (1 + tax_rate) AS total_amount FROM sales WHERE id = 1

cases.name: arithmetic_complex_test-5
cases.sql: SELECT quantity * price AS subtotal, quantity * price * (1 - discount) AS discounted, quantity * price * (1 - discount) * (1 + tax_rate) AS final_total FROM sales WHERE id = 1

cases.sql: SELECT ROUND(value * 2, 2) AS rounded_double FROM measurements WHERE id = 1

cases.sql: SELECT sqrt(value) + 10 AS sqrt_plus_ten FROM measurements WHERE id = 3

cases.name: arithmetic_complex_test-9
cases.sql: SELECT int_col + real_col AS int_plus_real FROM mixed WHERE id = 1

cases.sql: SELECT int_col * decimal_col AS int_times_decimal FROM mixed WHERE id = 1

cases.name: arithmetic_complex_test-11
cases.sql: SELECT decimal_col / int_col AS decimal_div_int FROM mixed WHERE id = 1

cases.name: arithmetic_complex_test-12
cases.sql: SELECT v1 + v2 * v3 - CAST(v4 AS REAL) / CAST(v5 AS REAL) + v1 * v2 + v3 * v4 - v5 AS long_expr FROM nums WHERE id = 1

cases.name: arithmetic_complex_test-13
cases.sql: SELECT ((((v1 + 1) * 2) - 3) / CAST(4 AS REAL)) * 5 AS chained FROM nums WHERE id = 1

cases.name: arithmetic_complex_test-14
cases.sql:
SELECT amount * 1.0 * CASE 
            WHEN status = 'premium' THEN 1.5 
            WHEN status = 'standard' THEN 1.2 
            ELSE 1.0 
         END AS adjusted_amount 
         FROM conditions 
         ORDER BY id

cases.name: arithmetic_subquery_test-1
cases.sql:
SELECT name, (SELECT SUM(amount * (1.0 - c.discount)) FROM orders o WHERE o.customer_id = c.id) AS total_after_discount 
         FROM customers c 
         ORDER BY id

cases.name: arithmetic_subquery_test-2
cases.sql:
SELECT customer_id, avg_amount * 1.1 AS projected_avg 
         FROM (SELECT customer_id, AVG(amount) AS avg_amount FROM orders GROUP BY customer_id) t
         ORDER BY customer_id

cases.name: arithmetic_subquery_test-3
cases.sql:
WITH product_totals AS (
            SELECT product, 
                   SUM(quantity) AS total_quantity,
                   SUM(quantity * unit_price) AS total_revenue
            FROM sales
            GROUP BY product
        )
        SELECT product, 
               total_revenue / total_quantity AS avg_price_per_unit,
               total_revenue * 1.2 AS projected_revenue
        FROM product_totals
        ORDER BY product

cases.name: arithmetic_subquery_test-4
cases.sql:
WITH RECURSIVE factorial AS (
            SELECT 1 AS n, 1.0 AS fact
            UNION ALL
            SELECT n + 1, fact * (n + 1)
            FROM factorial
            WHERE n < 5
        )
        SELECT n, fact AS factorial_value
        FROM factorial
        ORDER BY n

cases.name: arithmetic_subquery_test-5
cases.sql:
SELECT p.name, r.name AS region, 
                price_with_tax, 
                price_with_tax + r.shipping_cost AS final_price
         FROM products p
         CROSS JOIN regions r
         JOIN (
            SELECT p2.id AS product_id, r2.id AS region_id,
                   p2.base_price * (1 + r2.tax_rate) AS price_with_tax
            FROM products p2
            CROSS JOIN regions r2
         ) calc ON calc.product_id = p.id AND calc.region_id = r.id
         ORDER BY p.id, r.id

cases.name: arithmetic_subquery_test-6
cases.sql:
SELECT category,
                avg_value,
                avg_value * 2 AS double_avg,
                (SELECT (t2.avg_value - t1.avg_value) * 100 / t1.avg_value
                 FROM (SELECT AVG(value) AS avg_value FROM metrics) t2) AS pct_diff_from_overall
         FROM (SELECT category, AVG(value) AS avg_value FROM metrics GROUP BY category) t1
         ORDER BY category

cases.sql: SELECT price + 10 adjusted_price FROM products WHERE id = 1

cases.sql: SELECT cost * markup AS selling_price FROM items WHERE id = $1

cases.name: arithmetic_aliasing_test-5
cases.sql: SELECT cost * markup + 5 AS final_price FROM items WHERE id = $1

cases.name: arithmetic_aliasing_test-6
cases.sql: SELECT amount * 1.1 AS total_with_tax, created_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS utc_time FROM orders WHERE id = 1

cases.name: arithmetic_aliasing_test-7
cases.sql: SELECT num * 2.0 AS result FROM test_values WHERE id = 1

cases.name: arithmetic_aliasing_test-8
cases.sql: SELECT quantity * price AS total_value FROM inventory WHERE id = 1

cases.name: arithmetic_aliasing_test-9
cases.sql: SELECT CAST(price AS REAL) / quantity AS unit_price FROM inventory WHERE id = 1
